3163890.name: Spot The Difference: Space Ship
3163890.description:
Spot The Difference: Space Ship is a casual game where you monitor 27 rooms through cameras on a space ship.

Your job as the on-board A.I system is to keep the crew safe by identifying 'anomalies' that may occur during near speed of light speeds. Detected 'quantum fields' give you a heads up as to which room is about to have an anomaly and then you must find what the difference is when it occurs. The possible differences are: movement, color, rotation, size, and replacement,

New players may consider the game high paced and difficult until they are relatively comfortable with all the rooms.

The game contains normal and hard mode, each with their own sets of differences - 220+ events in total.
3163890.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
